member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2
member.summary:
Provides compiled query delegates for high-performance database operations.
Compiled queries are pre-compiled LINQ expressions that skip the expression tree compilation step on each execution. This provides 20-30% performance improvement for frequently used queries at the cost of increased memory usage.
Tradeoffs: - Performance: 20-30% faster execution for repeated queries - Memory: Higher memory usage due to cached compiled delegates - Flexibility: Limited to specific query patterns (no dynamic predicates) - Startup: Slight increase in startup time for initial compilation
When to use: - High-frequency queries (GetById, GetAll in hot paths) - Stable query patterns that don't change per request - Scenarios where query compilation time is a bottleneck
When NOT to use: - Dynamic queries with varying predicates - One-off or rarely executed queries - Memory-constrained environments
member.typeparam: The entity type.
The database context type.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2.#cctor
member.summary: Static constructor initializes compiled query delegates.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2.Initialize(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes the compiled queries. Must be called before using any compiled query methods.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2.IsInitialized
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the compiled queries have been initialized.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2.GetByIdAsync(`1,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its integer ID using a compiled query.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2.GetByIdAsync(`1,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its long ID using a compiled query.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2.GetAllAsync(`1,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities using a compiled query.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2.CountAsync(`1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Counts all entities using a compiled query.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledQueries`2.CountAsync(`1,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Counts entities matching a predicate using a compiled query.
member.remarks: Note: This uses EF.CompileAsyncQuery which has limitations with expression parameters. For complex predicates, the standard CountAsync may be more appropriate.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledRepoBase`2
member.typeparam: The entity type.
The database context type.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledRepoBase`2.#ctor(`1,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Repo.Repository.Base.RepoOptions,Repo.Repository.Interfaces.ICacheService,Repo.Repository.Security.IStoredProcedureWhitelist)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Repository options. If null, defaults to disabled compiled queries.
Optional whitelist for stored procedure validation.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledRepoBase`2.Options
member.summary: Gets the repository options.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledRepoBase`2.IsCompiledQueriesEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether compiled queries are enabled and initialized.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.CompiledRepoBase`2.CountAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Counts all entities using a compiled query when enabled.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.HighPerformanceRepo`2
member.summary: Repositorio optimizado para alto rendimiento - miles de transacciones por segundo

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1
member.summary: Interface for high-performance operations optimized for thousands of transactions per second
member.typeparam: Entity type

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkInsertAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Inserts thousands of records optimized using bulk operations

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkUpdateAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates thousands of records optimized

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkDeleteAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes thousands of records optimized

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkDeleteAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Deletes records by predicate using bulk operations

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.BulkMergeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Optimized merge (insert/update) operation

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ProcessBatchAsync``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes large data volumes in batches to avoid memory issues

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ProcessParallelAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes data in parallel with concurrency control

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.StreamAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets data in streaming to avoid loading everything in memory

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.GetPagedOptimizedAsync(Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Gets optimized paginated data for large volumes

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ExecuteWithMetricsAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Executes operation with performance metrics

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ExecuteWithMetricsAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Executes operation with performance metrics and returns result

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ConfigureForHighPerformance(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures context for high-performance operations

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ClearContextAsync
member.summary: Clears context to free memory

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ExecuteInTransactionAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Data.IsolationLevel)
member.summary: Executes operation in optimized transaction for large volumes

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IHighPerformanceRepo`1.ExecuteDistributedTransactionAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task}[])
member.summary: Executes multiple operations in distributed transaction

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.PerformanceMetrics
member.summary: Performance metrics for monitoring

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1
member.summary:
Repository interface for entity operations.
Transaction Management: - Use IUnitOfWork for all transaction orchestration - Repositories obtained via IUnitOfWork.Repository<T>() automatically participate in UnitOfWork transactions
Retry Policy for Transient Faults: - Read operations (GetAllAsync, GetById, FindAsync, GetPagedAsync, GetBySpecAsync, GetAllBySpecAsync) automatically retry on transient database failures - Configure via AddRepositoryRetryPolicy() in DI container during startup - Only safe operations are retried. Write operations (Insert, Update, Delete) are NOT retried unless they are explicitly idempotent - Default: 3 retries with exponential backoff (200ms, 400ms, 800ms) - Handles: SqlException transient errors, TimeoutException, InvalidOperationException (EF Core transient errors) - To disable retry globally: services.AddRepositoryRetryPolicy(options => options.EnableRetry = false)

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.Find(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Finds an entity by its integer ID.
member.param: The entity ID. Can be null.
member.returns: The found entity.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.Find(System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.summary: Finds an entity by its long ID (bigint).
member.param: The entity ID. Can be null.
member.returns: The found entity.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetAll(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets all entities with optional no-tracking.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
member.returns: An enumerable of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets all entities with optional no-tracking (overload with unused id parameter for API compatibility).
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
member.returns: An enumerable of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.Add(`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a new entity to the context.
member.param: If true, saves changes immediately. Default is true.
member.returns: The number of affected rows if persisted, otherwise 0.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.Update(`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates an existing entity in the context.
member.param: If true, saves changes immediately. Default is true.
member.returns: The number of affected rows if persisted, otherwise 0.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.Delete(`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Deletes an entity from the context.
member.param: If true, saves changes immediately. Default is true.
member.returns: The number of affected rows if persisted, otherwise 0.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.Save
member.summary: Saves all changes made in the context to the database.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetAllAsync(System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities asynchronously with optional no-tracking.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetAllAsync(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities asynchronously with optional no-tracking (overload with unused id parameter).
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its integer ID asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the found entity.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetById(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its long ID asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the found entity.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.Insert(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inserts a new entity asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the inserted entity.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.UpdateAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an entity asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the updated entity.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.DeleteAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an entity by its integer ID asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.DeleteAsync(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an entity by its long ID asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.SaveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves all changes made in the context to the database asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.ExecuteStoredProcedureAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a stored procedure that returns a result set asynchronously.
member.typeparam: The type of entities returned by the stored procedure.
member.param: The name of the stored procedure.
Parameters to pass to the stored procedure.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of results.
member.exception: Thrown when stored procedure name is null or empty.
Thrown when stored procedure is not whitelisted.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.ExecuteStoredProcedureNonQueryAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a stored procedure that does not return a result set asynchronously.
member.param: The name of the stored procedure.
Parameters to pass to the stored procedure.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.
member.exception: Thrown when stored procedure name is null or empty.
Thrown when stored procedure is not whitelisted.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.ExecuteScalarFunctionAsync``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a scalar database function and returns the result.
member.typeparam: The return type of the scalar function.
member.param: Parameters to pass to the function.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the scalar result.
member.exception: Thrown when function name is null or empty.
Thrown when function is not whitelisted.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.ExecuteTableValuedFunctionAsync``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a table-valued database function and returns the results.
member.typeparam: The entity type returned by the function.
member.param: Parameters to pass to the function.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of results from the table-valued function.
member.exception: Thrown when function name is null or empty.
Thrown when function is not whitelisted.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetPagedAsync(Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated result set asynchronously.
member.param: The pagination request containing page number, page size, and sorting options.
If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing a paginated result set.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetPagedAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a filtered and paginated result set asynchronously.
member.param: The pagination request containing page number, page size, and sorting options.
If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing a filtered paginated result set.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetBySpecAsync(Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single entity by specification asynchronously.
member.param: The specification containing criteria and includes.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the found entity or null if not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetAllBySpecAsync(Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities matching a specification asynchronously.
member.param: The specification containing criteria, includes, and ordering.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetPagedBySpecAsync(Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification{`0},Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated result set by specification asynchronously.
member.param: The specification containing criteria, includes, ordering, and paging.
The pagination request containing page number and page size.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing a paginated result set.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.CountBySpecAsync(Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Counts entities matching a specification asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the count of matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.FindAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds entities matching a predicate asynchronously.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.FindAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Object}}[])
member.summary: Finds entities matching a predicate with includes asynchronously.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
Expressions specifying related entities to include.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of matching entities with includes.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.FirstOrDefaultAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the first entity matching a predicate or null if none found asynchronously.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context. Default is false.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the first matching entity or null.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.AnyAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Determines whether any entity matches the predicate asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing true if any entity matches; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.CountAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Counts entities matching the predicate asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the count of matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.AddRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds multiple entities asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.

member.summary: Updates multiple entities asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.

member.summary: Deletes multiple entities asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.

member.summary: Deletes entities matching a predicate asynchronously.
member.param: Expression to filter entities to delete.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.SoftDeleteAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft deletes an entity by its integer ID asynchronously.
member.param: Optional identifier of the user performing the deletion.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.summary: Soft deletes an entity by its long ID asynchronously.
member.param: Optional identifier of the user performing the deletion.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.SoftDeleteAsync(`0,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft deletes an entity asynchronously.
member.param: Optional identifier of the user performing the deletion.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetAllIncludingDeletedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities including soft-deleted ones asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of all entities including soft-deleted.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.RestoreAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a soft-deleted entity by its integer ID asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.RestoreAsync(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a soft-deleted entity by its long ID asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the number of affected rows.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetByIdWithCacheAsync(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its integer ID with caching support asynchronously.
member.param: Optional cache expiration time. Default is implementation-specific.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the found entity or null if not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetByIdWithCacheAsync(System.Int64,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its long ID with caching support asynchronously.
member.param: Optional cache expiration time. Default is implementation-specific.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing the found entity or null if not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.GetAllWithCacheAsync(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities with caching support asynchronously.
member.param: Optional cache expiration time. Default is implementation-specific.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing an enumerable of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo`1.InvalidateCacheAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invalidates cache entries matching a pattern asynchronously.
member.param: The pattern to match cache keys. Default is "*" (all).
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2
M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.AddRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds multiple entities in a single operation.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.UpdateRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates multiple entities in a single operation.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.DeleteRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes multiple entities in a single operation.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.DeleteRangeAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes all entities matching the specified predicate.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetByIdWithCacheAsync(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by integer ID with caching support. If cache service is not configured, falls back to GetById.
member.returns: The cached or freshly retrieved entity.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetByIdWithCacheAsync(System.Int64,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by long ID with caching support. If cache service is not configured, falls back to GetById.
member.returns: The cached or freshly retrieved entity.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetAllWithCacheAsync(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities with caching support. If cache service is not configured, falls back to GetAllAsync.
member.returns: The cached or freshly retrieved list of entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.InvalidateCacheAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invalidates cache entries matching the specified pattern.
member.param: The pattern to match cache keys (default: "*" for all).

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.Find(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Finds an entity by its integer ID.
member.returns: The found entity.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.Find(System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.summary: Finds an entity by its long ID (converted to int).
member.returns: The found entity.
member.exception: Thrown when id is null.
Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetAll(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets all entities with optional no-tracking.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: A list of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets all entities with optional no-tracking (overload with unused id parameter for compatibility).
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: A list of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.Add(`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a new entity to the context.
member.returns: The number of affected rows if persisted, otherwise 0.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.Update(`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates an existing entity in the context.
member.returns: The number of affected rows if persisted, otherwise 0.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.Delete(`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Deletes an entity from the context.
member.returns: The number of affected rows if persisted, otherwise 0.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.Save
member.summary: Saves all changes made in the context to the database.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.SaveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously saves all changes made in the context to the database.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetAllAsync(System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities asynchronously with optional no-tracking.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: A list of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetAllAsync(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities asynchronously with optional no-tracking (overload with unused id parameter).
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: A list of all entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its integer ID asynchronously.
member.returns: The found entity.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetById(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an entity by its long ID asynchronously (converted to int).
member.returns: The found entity.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.Insert(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Inserts a new entity asynchronously.
member.returns: The inserted entity.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.UpdateAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an entity asynchronously.
member.returns: The updated entity.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.DeleteAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an entity by its integer ID asynchronously.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.DeleteAsync(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an entity by its long ID asynchronously.
member.exception: Thrown when entity is not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetPagedAsync(Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of entities with optional search and sorting.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: A paged result containing entities and metadata.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetPagedAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of entities matching the specified filter expression.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: A paged result containing filtered entities and metadata.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.ApplySearchFilter(System.Linq.IQueryable{`0},System.String)
member.summary: Applies a search filter to the query based on the search term.
member.returns: The filtered query.
member.exception: Always thrown as this method requires implementation.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.FindAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds all entities matching the specified predicate.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: A list of matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.FindAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Object}}[])
member.summary: Finds all entities matching the specified predicate with eager loading of related entities.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: A list of matching entities with included relations.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.FirstOrDefaultAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the first entity matching the specified predicate, or null if not found.
member.param: If true, entities will not be tracked by the context.
member.returns: The first matching entity, or null.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.AnyAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if any entity matches the specified predicate.
member.returns: True if any entity matches; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.CountAsync(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Counts entities matching the specified predicate.
member.returns: The count of matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.SoftDeleteAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft deletes an entity by its integer ID. If entity doesn't implement ISoftDelete, performs hard delete.
member.param: Optional identifier of who performed the deletion.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.SoftDeleteAsync(System.Int64,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft deletes an entity by its long ID. If entity doesn't implement ISoftDelete, performs hard delete.
member.param: Optional identifier of who performed the deletion.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.SoftDeleteAsync(`0,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft deletes an entity. If entity doesn't implement ISoftDelete, performs hard delete.
member.param: Optional identifier of who performed the deletion.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetAllIncludingDeletedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities including soft-deleted ones. For entities not implementing ISoftDelete, behaves like GetAllAsync.
member.returns: A list of all entities including soft-deleted.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.RestoreAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a soft-deleted entity by its integer ID.
member.returns: The number of affected rows (0 if entity doesn't support soft delete).

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.RestoreAsync(System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a soft-deleted entity by its long ID.
member.returns: The number of affected rows (0 if entity doesn't support soft delete).

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetBySpecAsync(Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single entity matching the specified specification.
member.returns: The matching entity, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetAllBySpecAsync(Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all entities matching the specified specification.
member.returns: A list of matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.GetPagedBySpecAsync(Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification{`0},Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of entities matching the specified specification.
member.returns: A paged result containing matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.CountBySpecAsync(Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Counts entities matching the specified specification.
member.returns: The count of matching entities.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.ValidateStoredProcedureName(System.String)
member.summary: Validates that a stored procedure or function name is allowed by the whitelist. If no whitelist is configured, validation passes for backward compatibility.
member.exception: Thrown when the name is not in the whitelist and validation is required.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.ExecuteStoredProcedureAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a stored procedure and returns the results as entities.
member.typeparam: The type of the result entities.
member.param: The stored procedure name or SQL.
member.returns: A list of entities returned by the stored procedure.
member.exception: Thrown when stored procedure name is empty.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.ExecuteStoredProcedureNonQueryAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a stored procedure without returning results (non-query).
member.param: The stored procedure name or SQL.
member.returns: The number of affected rows.
member.exception: Thrown when stored procedure name is empty.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.ExecuteScalarFunctionAsync``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a scalar-valued function and returns the result.
member.typeparam: The return type of the function.
member.returns: The scalar result.
member.exception: Thrown when function name is empty.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBase`2.ExecuteTableValuedFunctionAsync``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a table-valued function and returns the results as entities.
member.typeparam: The type of the result entities.
member.returns: A list of entities returned by the function.
member.exception: Thrown when function name is empty.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoBaseEnhanced`2
member.summary: [OBSOLETE] This class has been consolidated into RepoBase. Use instead. This wrapper is provided for backward compatibility and will be removed in a future version.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the repository.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoOptions.EnableCompiledQueries
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether compiled queries are enabled. Default is false for backward compatibility.
member.remarks: Compiled queries provide 20-30% performance improvement for frequently used operations like GetById, GetAllAsync, and CountAsync. However, they use additional memory. Enable this only when you have identified performance bottlenecks.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Base.RepoOptions.LogCompiledQueryUsage
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to log when compiled queries are used.
member.remarks: Useful for debugging and monitoring compiled query usage in development environments.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.EntityNotFoundException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an entity is not found in the repository.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.RepositoryException
member.summary: Base exception for all repository-related errors.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.SecurityException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a security validation fails, such as when a stored procedure or function is not in the whitelist.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.SecurityException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.SecurityException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Exceptions.SecurityException.ProcedureNotWhitelisted(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a SecurityException for a non-whitelisted stored procedure or function.
member.param: The name of the procedure that was not whitelisted.
member.returns: A new SecurityException with a descriptive message.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for database function execution. These methods provide first-class support for scalar and table-valued database functions.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions.ExecuteScalarFunctionAsync``2(Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo{``0},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a scalar database function and returns the result.
member.typeparam: The entity type of the repository.
The return type of the scalar function.
member.param: The name of the database function.
Parameters to pass to the function.
member.returns: The scalar result from the function.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions.ExecuteTableValuedFunctionAsync``2(Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo{``0},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Executes a table-valued database function and returns the results.
member.typeparam: The entity type of the repository.
The entity type returned by the function.
member.param: The name of the database function.
Parameters to pass to the function.
member.returns: An enumerable of results from the table-valued function.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions.ExecuteAggregateFunctionAsync``2(Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo{``0},System.String,System.String,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Executes a built-in or user-defined aggregate function.
member.typeparam: The entity type of the repository.
The return type of the aggregate.
member.param: The aggregate function name (e.g., COUNT, SUM, AVG, MAX, MIN).
member.returns: The aggregated value.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.DatabaseFunctionExtensions.ExecuteWindowFunctionAsync``2(Repo.Repository.Base.IRepo{``0},System.String,System.String[],System.String[])
member.summary: Executes a window function (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, etc.) over a result set.
member.typeparam: The entity type of the repository.
The entity type with window function results.
member.returns: Results with window function values.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Extensions.RetryServiceExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering retry policies in the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.RetryServiceExtensions.AddRepositoryRetryPolicy(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions})
member.param: Optional configuration action for retry policy options.
member.returns: The service collection for chaining.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Extensions.RetryServiceExtensions.AddRepositoryRetryPolicy(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions)
member.summary: Adds repository retry policy services with explicit options instance.
member.returns: The service collection for chaining.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Represents a paginated result set.
member.typeparam: The type of items in the result.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.Data
member.summary: The paginated data items. This is the primary property.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.Items
member.summary: [OBSOLETE] Use instead. This property is provided for backward compatibility.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.Page
member.summary: The current page number (1-based). This is the primary property.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.PageNumber
member.summary: [OBSOLETE] Use instead. This property is provided for backward compatibility.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.PageSize
member.summary: The number of items per page.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.TotalPages
member.summary: The total number of pages calculated from TotalCount and PageSize.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.HasPreviousPage
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether there is a previous page.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.HasNextPage
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether there is a next page.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedResult`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified data.
member.param: The total number of items across all pages.
The number of items per page.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest
member.summary: Represents a request for paginated data.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest.PageNumber
member.summary: The page number to retrieve (1-based). Default is 1.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest.PageSize
member.summary: The number of items per page. Default is 10.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest.SortBy
member.summary: The property name to sort by. Null if no sorting is required.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest.IsAscending
member.summary: Whether to sort in ascending order. Default is true.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest.SearchTerm
member.summary: A search term to filter results. Null if no search is required.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Models.PagedRequest.Filters
member.summary: Additional filters as key-value pairs. Null if no additional filters are required.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy
member.summary:
Default implementation of retry policy with exponential backoff and jitter.
This policy handles transient database faults including: - SQL Server timeout errors (-2) - Connection failures (53, 258) - Login failures (4060, 18456, 18452, 18450) - Azure SQL transient errors (40197, 40501, 40613) - General timeout exceptions
IMPORTANT: This policy should ONLY be used for safe operations (reads). Write operations (Insert, Update, Delete) should NOT be retried unless they are idempotent.

member.name: F:Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy.TransientSqlErrorNumbers
member.summary: SQL Server transient error numbers based on Microsoft documentation. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-sql/database/troubleshoot-common-errors-issues

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy.#ctor(Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with explicit options.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy.IsTransientException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Determines whether an exception is transient and should be retried.
member.returns: True if the exception is transient; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy.IsTransientSqlError(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlException)
member.summary: Determines whether a SQL exception is transient.
member.returns: True if the SQL error is transient; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Retry.DefaultRetryPolicy.CalculateDelay(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the delay for the next retry attempt using exponential backoff with optional jitter.
member.returns: The delay to wait before the next retry.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Retry.IRetryPolicy
member.summary: Defines a retry policy for transient fault handling.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Retry.IRetryPolicy.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an operation with retry logic.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Retry.IRetryPolicy.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an operation with retry logic.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for retry policies.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions.MaxRetryAttempts
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts. Default: 3

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions.InitialDelay
member.summary: Initial delay before first retry. Default: 200ms

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions.MaxDelay
member.summary: Maximum delay cap for exponential backoff. Default: 30 seconds

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions.UseExponentialBackoff
member.summary: Whether to use exponential backoff. Default: true

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions.UseJitter
member.summary: Whether to add jitter to delays (recommended for distributed systems). Default: true

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Retry.RetryPolicyOptions.EnableRetry
member.summary: Enable/disable retry policy. Default: true

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist
member.summary: Default implementation of . Validates stored procedure and function names against a configured whitelist.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The options containing the whitelist configuration.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist.IsAllowed(System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the specified stored procedure or function name is allowed. When whitelist is disabled (RequireWhitelist = false), all names are allowed. When whitelist is empty and disabled, all names are allowed for backward compatibility.
member.param: The name of the stored procedure or function to validate.
member.returns: True if the name is whitelisted or if whitelist validation is disabled; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist.GetWhitelistedNames
member.summary: Gets all whitelisted stored procedure and function names.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of whitelisted names.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.DefaultStoredProcedureWhitelist.ExtractProcedureName(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the actual procedure name from a SQL command string. Handles formats like "EXEC sp_name @param" or "sp_name".
member.returns: The extracted procedure name.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Security.IStoredProcedureWhitelist
member.summary: Defines the contract for validating stored procedure and function names against a whitelist.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.IStoredProcedureWhitelist.IsAllowed(System.String)
member.summary: Validates if the specified stored procedure or function name is allowed.
member.param: The name of the stored procedure or function to validate.
member.returns: True if the name is whitelisted; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.IStoredProcedureWhitelist.GetWhitelistedNames
member.summary: Gets all whitelisted stored procedure and function names.
member.returns: An enumerable collection of whitelisted names.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for stored procedure and function whitelist validation.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.RequireWhitelist
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether whitelist validation is required. When set to false (default), all stored procedures and functions are allowed for backward compatibility. When set to true, only whitelisted procedures and functions are allowed.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.WhitelistedProcedures
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of whitelisted stored procedure and function names. Names are case-insensitive.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.ThrowOnValidationFailure
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to throw a SecurityException when validation fails. When set to true, a SecurityException is thrown for non-whitelisted procedures. When set to false, the validation passes without exception (for backward compatibility). Default is true when RequireWhitelist is true.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.AddWhitelistedProcedure(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a stored procedure or function name to the whitelist.
member.returns: The current options instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Security.StoredProcedureOptions.AddWhitelistedProcedures(System.String[])
member.summary: Adds multiple stored procedure or function names to the whitelist.
member.returns: The current options instance for method chaining.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfigurationService
member.summary: Cache configuration service that allows choosing between Redis and MemoryCache

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfigurationService.AddCacheService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures the cache service based on Redis availability

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfigurationService.AddMemoryCacheService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Configures the cache service forcing the use of MemoryCache

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfigurationService.AddRedisCacheService(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the cache service forcing the use of Redis

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService
member.summary: Configuration service for optimizing database performance

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.ConfigureDbContext``1(``0)
member.summary: Configures DbContext for high performance

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.ConfigureSqlConnection(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection)
member.summary: Configures SQL Server connection for high performance

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.GetBulkOperationConfig
member.summary: Gets optimized configuration for bulk operations

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.GetConcurrencyConfig
member.summary: Gets concurrency configuration

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.GetCacheConfig
member.summary: Gets cache configuration

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Services.HighPerformanceConfigService.GetMonitoringConfig
member.summary: Gets monitoring configuration

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.BulkOperationConfig
member.summary: Configuration for bulk operations

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.ConcurrencyConfig
member.summary: Concurrency configuration

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.CacheConfig
member.summary: Cache configuration

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Services.MonitoringConfig
member.summary: Monitoring configuration

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1
member.summary: Defines a specification pattern for querying entities with filtering, includes, ordering, and paging.
member.typeparam: The entity type.
member.remarks: The Specification pattern encapsulates query criteria and allows for reusable, composable queries. Use with IRepo methods like GetBySpecAsync, GetAllBySpecAsync, and GetPagedBySpecAsync.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.Criteria
member.summary: Gets the filter criteria expression.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.Includes
member.summary: Gets the list of include expressions for related entities.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.IncludeStrings
member.summary: Gets the list of include strings for related entities (supports nested includes).

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.OrderBy
member.summary: Gets the ascending order expression.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.OrderByDescending
member.summary: Gets the descending order expression.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.Take
member.summary: Gets the number of items to take (for paging).

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.Skip
member.summary: Gets the number of items to skip (for paging).

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.IsPagingEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether paging is enabled.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.ISpecification`1.IsTrackingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether change tracking is enabled.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1
member.summary: Base implementation of the interface.
member.typeparam: The entity type.
member.remarks: Inherit from this class to create custom specifications. Use the protected methods to configure the specification with criteria, includes, ordering, and paging.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.Criteria
member.summary: Gets the filter criteria expression.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.Includes
member.summary: Gets the list of include expressions for related entities.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.IncludeStrings
member.summary: Gets the list of include strings for related entities (supports nested includes).

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.OrderBy
member.summary: Gets the ascending order expression.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.OrderByDescending
member.summary: Gets the descending order expression.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.Take
member.summary: Gets the number of items to take (for paging).

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.Skip
member.summary: Gets the number of items to skip (for paging).

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.IsPagingEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether paging is enabled.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.IsTrackingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether change tracking is enabled. Default is true.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.AddCriteria(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Adds filter criteria to the specification.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.AddInclude(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Object}})
member.summary: Adds an include expression for a related entity.
member.param: Expression specifying the related entity to include.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.AddInclude(System.String)
member.summary: Adds an include string for a related entity (supports nested includes like "Orders.Items").

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.AddOrderBy(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Object}})
member.summary: Adds ascending order to the specification.
member.param: Expression specifying the property to order by.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.AddOrderByDescending(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,System.Object}})
member.summary: Adds descending order to the specification.
member.param: Expression specifying the property to order by descending.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.Specifications.BaseSpecification`1.ApplyPaging(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Applies paging to the specification.
member.param: The number of items to skip.
The number of items to take.

member.name: T:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork
M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.Repository``1
member.summary: Gets a repository for the specified entity type. Repositories obtained through this method participate in the UnitOfWork's transaction scope.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync
member.summary: Saves all pending changes to the database. When inside a transaction, changes are persisted but not committed until CommitTransactionAsync is called.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction with default isolation level. This is the PRIMARY method for starting transactions - use UnitOfWork, not repository methods.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(System.Data.IsolationLevel)
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction with specified isolation level. Use this overload when you need explicit control over transaction isolation behavior.
member.param: The isolation level for the transaction (e.g., ReadCommitted, Serializable, Snapshot).

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.CommitTransactionAsync
member.summary: Commits the current transaction. All changes made since BeginTransactionAsync are permanently saved.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.RollbackTransactionAsync
member.summary: Rolls back the current transaction. All changes made since BeginTransactionAsync are discarded.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.CurrentTransaction
member.summary: Gets the current database transaction if one is active. Returns null if no transaction is in progress.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.IUnitOfWork.HasActiveTransaction
member.summary: Returns true if a transaction is currently active.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.CurrentTransaction
member.summary: Gets the current database transaction if one is active.

member.name: P:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.HasActiveTransaction
member.summary: Returns true if a transaction is currently active.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.Repository``1
member.summary: Gets a repository for the specified entity type. Repositories participate in the UnitOfWork's transaction scope automatically.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.SaveChangesAsync
member.summary: Saves all pending changes to the database.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.BeginTransactionAsync
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction. This is the PRIMARY method for starting transactions.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.BeginTransactionAsync(System.Data.IsolationLevel)
member.summary: Begins a new database transaction with specified isolation level.
member.param: The isolation level for the transaction.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.CommitTransactionAsync
member.summary: Commits the current transaction.

member.name: M:Repo.Repository.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.RollbackTransactionAsync
member.summary: Rolls back the current transaction.
